note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 3/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 0.5 cm x 1.5 cm x 0.4 cm.
  Wound bed: 27% slough, 73% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — improving.
Plan: Offloading boot applied. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Abscess to Right cervical / Measures 0.5 cm x 1.5 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, moderate. No odor noted. Treatment: Pack with iodoform gauze daily.
